name: Cinnamon Poppy Seed Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Generously butter a 12-cup Bundt pan.
3. In a small bowl, combine half of the sugar and cinnamon.
4. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
5. Using an electric mixer, beat the butter and vanilla extract until fluffy.
6. Gradually add the remaining 1 cup of sugar, beating until smooth.
7. Beat in egg yolks one at a time.
8. Mix in the flour mixture alternately with buttermilk, adding each in three portions.
9. Fold in poppy seeds.
10. In a medium bowl, whisk egg whites until foamy.
11. Gradually add the remaining half of sugar to the egg whites, beating until peaks form.
12. Fold the egg white mixture into the batter in two additions.
13. Spoon half of the cake batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar mixture.
14. Spoon the remaining batter over the top and sprinkle with the remaining cinnamon-sugar.
15. Bake for about 50 minutes, or until a tester inserted near the center comes out clean.
16. Cool the cake in the pan on a rack for 10 minutes.
17. Turn the cake out onto a rack and cool completely.
